About
Welcome to my website! I'm currently a student at UW-Madison majoring both Computer Science and Biochemistry. There's so much that I want to explore with Computer Science, and the possibilities of helping the medical world with these skills entices me. As a result, I'm hoping to pursue a career that helps the intersection between healthcare and technology.
